## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Global Predictions and fwd.digital for SEO and content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers comprehensive AI-driven content creation, SEO, and link-building services, starting at $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Global Predictions is interested in programmatic SEO and link-building support, but has budget constraints](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [fwd.digital's services are flexible within the minimum commitment, allowing focus on specific work streams](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Alexander is 20% likely to engage fwd.digital, primarily for link building and programmatic SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)

## Topics

### Global Predictions' Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Publishing \~40 new articles monthly for the past 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [In-house marketing specialist ($3,000/month) manages content creation](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Using AI tools with human review, especially for compliance](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [\~60,000 programmatically generated pages live, starting to gain traction](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Lack of domain authority building and backlinking partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)

### fwd.digital's Service Offerings

  - [AI-augmented content creation: 50-100k words/month at $0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [15 full-time managing editors, including FinTech specialists](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Comprehensive workflow: strategy, creation, optimization, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Content refreshing to maintain relevance and improve performance](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Link building: 15-20 high domain authority backlinks/month](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO capabilities with human review and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Structure

  - [Minimum engagement: $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Flexible allocation of resources across different work streams](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [For programmatic SEO: \~1,200 high-quality pages over 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Link building offered as an add-on service](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Focus on programmatic SEO optimization for existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Link building to increase domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Possibility of tailoring services within the $9,000/month framework](https://fathom.video/share/--16qjWfMzYyhyxzykvxmynLrC4_Fyg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
